prerequisites.value: Int 13; Combat Expertise or brawler’s cunning class feature; Lunge; Outslug Style; Weapon Focus with the chosen weapon.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Outslug Style, you don’t take a â2 penalty to your AC when using the Lunge feat. The bonuses to AC and on weapon damage rolls that you gain from Outslug Style increase to +2.
